subcodes.first_line: The Dawning-Place of divine verses and the Dayspring of heavenly evidences hath, time and again, tasted the sweetness of captivity and imprisonment in the path of the Friend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مطلع آیات الهی و مشرق بینات ربانی چند کره لذت اسیری و سجن را در سبیل دوست
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @justice and wrath of God
